trigger: 高府喜堂女儿婚礼对拜时

appearance_delta.face: 中年儒雅，皱纹渐增，眼角慈祥略带释然

visual_reference: middle-aged Chinese official in ancient dynasty during wedding ceremony, kind face with wrinkles showing complex emotions, graying hair in formal hat, medium build in deep gray official robes, gentle paternal expression with subtle worry as daughter bows in marriage, highly detailed, festive red candle lighting
